name: OpenFOAM CFD (Cookbook)
description: The official OpenCFD OpenFOAM image (runtime + tutorials), no custom Dockerfile. Pull the registry image from LabPod Images after importing, then enable. Terminal-only - work through LabPod's Terminal running OpenFOAM command-line tools (blockMesh, icoFoam, etc.). See github.com/LabPod/labpod-cookbook/tree/main/openfoam-cfd.
